name: Six Strike - Triple Impact
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>段</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If you control 3 or more face-up "Six Samurai" monsters, you can activate 1 of these effects:
● Destroy all face-up monsters your opponent controls.
● Destroy all face-up Spell/Trap Cards your opponent controls.
● Destroy all Set Spell/Trap Cards your opponent controls.
eff:
If you control 3 or more face-up "Six Samurai" monsters, you can activate 1 of these effects:
● Destroy all face-up monsters your opponent controls.
● Destroy all face-up Spell/Trap Cards your opponent controls.
● Destroy all Set Spell/Trap Cards your opponent controls.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
